experiment.name: realtime_context_update
experiment.description: Compare two append-only status update formats for LLM context: repeated-key (same label each update) vs indexed-log (numbered entries). Tests recognition accuracy across 6 difficulty levels.

diff.description: repeated-key format vs indexed-log format for status updates

agent_a.name: repeated_key

agent_b.name: indexed_log
